chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1213 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 11.12.2024 Syed Zafar Ali Shah Bukhari, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant AG Sindh along with Muhammad Naeem Bandhani, Office Superintendent, Deputy Director, Industries, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files comments on behalf of respondent No.2, taken on record. Per prayer clause, the petitioners seek directions regarding pendency of an application before respondent No.4. After having heard learned counsel for the petitioners as well learned Assistant AG and gone through the file, we found that though the respondent No.4 is the office bear of Sindh Primary School Teachers Association; however is not a government entity or holding any office, which may be termed to be a person in terms of Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Even, the application available at page-19 reveals it was addressed to respondent No.4 and not to respondents No.2 and 3, therefore, the petition in view of the averments as well prayer clause seemingly is misconceived, consequently is hereby dismissed with no order as to costs. However, the petitioners are at liberty to move an application before respondents No.2 and 3, if so advised. Judge Judge ARBROHI
